auth.title: Admin Authentication
auth.descToken: Enter your admin token to access management features
auth.descVerification: A verification code has been sent to Telegram. Enter the 6-digit code to log in
auth.sessionMissing: Verification session not found, please try again
auth.reenterToken: Please re-enter the admin token first

dashboard.heroDescription:
Built on Cloudflare Workers
Distributed, low-latency, high-performance AI unified gateway
dashboard.featureMultiChannelDesc: Supports OpenAI, Claude, Gemini, Azure OpenAI and more AI providers.
dashboard.featureLoadBalanceDesc: Weighted multi-channel routing, single-channel multi-key retry/rotation, and cross-channel fallback.
dashboard.featureUsageTrackingDesc: Real-time Analytics Engine statistics with log retrospection for cost analysis.
dashboard.featureSecurityDesc: Token-based access control with independent API key allocation.
dashboard.quickStartDesc: Four steps to configure and start using the unified API

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Configure AI provider endpoints, manage models and load balancing
channels.emptyDescription: Connect to AI providers (OpenAI, Gemini, Azure, Claude) for proxying and forwarding API requests.
channels.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this channel?
channels.channelWeightHint: Higher weight is preferred for the same model; equal weights are randomly distributed.
channels.channelStatusHint: Disabled channels won't receive requests or appear in model lists.
channels.apiKeysHint: One key per line. Requests will randomly select a key.
channels.autoRetryHint: Automatically retry up to 3 times on retryable errors
channels.autoRotateHint: Rotate to a different key on retry; when disabled, retries use the same key
channels.modelConfigDesc: External calls use the model name; the system maps it to the channel model ID.
channels.defaultParamsDialogDesc: Enter a JSON object. Parameters explicitly sent by callers override matching defaults here.
channels.modelNamePlaceholder: Model name, defaults to model ID
channels.selectModelsDesc: Select from upstream model list. Existing models with matching IDs will keep their aliases and enabled status.
channels.searchModelPlaceholder: Search model ID or display name
channels.selectAtLeastOneModel: Please select at least one model
channels.modelJsonStructure: JSON array with `id`, `name`, `enabled`, and optional `default_params` object per item.
channels.fillRequired: Please fill in all required fields
channels.fillTypeEndpointKey: Please fill in channel type, API endpoint, and API key first

validation.atLeastOneModel: At least one model is required
validation.modelJsonMustBeArray: Model JSON must be an array
validation.modelJsonItemMustBeObject: Model JSON items must be objects
validation.modelJsonIdEmpty: Model ID in JSON cannot be empty
validation.defaultParamsJsonMustBeObject: Default parameters must be a JSON object

tokens.title: Tokens
tokens.description: Manage API access tokens and quotas
tokens.emptyDescription: Tokens authenticate API requests. Each token can have independent access permissions and usage quotas.
tokens.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete this token?
tokens.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset this token's usage?
tokens.noChannelsHint: Please add channels in Channel Management first
tokens.quotaHint: Paid models will be unavailable after quota is exhausted.
tokens.quotaPlaceholder: Enter USD amount, 0 for no quota, -1 for unlimited

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.searchPlaceholder: Search models, channels, tokens, or billing types
pricing.billingVolumeDesc: Input / Output / Cache billed per M tokens
pricing.billingRequestDesc: Fixed amount billed per successful response
pricing.legacyRequestNote: Legacy per-request price {{price}}. Editing will switch to the new billing model.
pricing.noModelsHint: Sync model lists in Channel Management first, or switch to JSON mode to add pricing manually.
pricing.noMatchingCardsHint: Current filters are too strict. Try broadening channels, tokens, types, or keywords.
pricing.jsonConfigDesc: Only pricing fields > 0 are saved by default; however `billingMode: "request"` is preserved even with all-zero prices. Switching back to card mode auto-merges with current channel models.
pricing.jsonFormatHint: Format: model name → { billingMode?: "volume" | "request", input?: input price, output?: output price, cache?: cache price, request?: legacy per-request price }

analytics.title: Dashboard
analytics.description: Aggregate view of requests, costs, success rates, and key dimension breakdowns.
analytics.noTrendDataHint: Trend charts will appear after the first usage events are recorded.
analytics.modelRankingDesc: See which models handle the most requests, along with quality and cost metrics.
analytics.channelRankingDesc: Compare request capacity and stability across channels.
analytics.tokenRankingDesc: Identify the most active access tokens by request volume.
analytics.providerRankingDesc: Measure each upstream provider's request share and stability.
analytics.breakdownEmpty: No ranking data for the current time range

usageLogs.title: Usage Logs
usageLogs.description: Filter usage records by time range and dimension to investigate anomalous devices, failed requests, and upstream issues.
usageLogs.noMatchingLogsHint: Try adjusting the time range, dimension, or keyword.

apiTest.title: Playground
apiTest.description: Debug multi-turn conversations with a selected token, model, and channel
apiTest.paramsUnsupported: This endpoint does not support visual parameters. You can edit the custom request body directly.
apiTest.conversationEmpty: Select an API token and model, then send your first message.
apiTest.messagePlaceholder: Type a message, Ctrl/⌘ + Enter to send
apiTest.emptyReadableResponse: The response has no readable text content. Open the raw response body for details.

settings.title: Settings
settings.telegramNotVerified: Bind Telegram to enable login verification and notifications.
settings.telegramNeedTest: Send a test message. Security settings will unlock after verification.
settings.telegramVerified: Telegram login verification and notifications are enabled.
settings.testMessageSent: Test message sent, please check Telegram
settings.fillBotTokenFirst: Please fill in Bot Token and Chat ID first.
settings.testUnlockHint: The security toggle will unlock after a successful test.
settings.displayPrecisionDesc: Display amounts with {{decimals}} decimal places, e.g. ${{example}}
settings.apiDocsDesc: When enabled, exposes Swagger, ReDoc, and OpenAPI JSON. When disabled, these routes return 404.

apiClient.authExpired: Session expired, please log in again
apiClient.forbidden: You don't have permission for this action
apiClient.notFound: The requested resource was not found
apiClient.serviceUnavailable: Service temporarily unavailable, please try again later
apiClient.networkError: Network connection failed, please check your connection
